summary: Excellent matrix mix captures a strong Jerry‑led performance with standout Candyman and Terrapin Station moments.
review: The recording is praised as an excellent matrix blend that delivers clear, well‑balanced sound, despite a few early hiccups in the drums. Musically the show shines – Jerry’s guitar is on fire, the crowd builds during Candyman, and Terrapin Station rolls without any “nasty” moments.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are highly favorable (average 4.7 stars), highlighting both an outstanding performance and a top‑notch matrix recording; only minor drum quirks are noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Synergistic blend of soundboard and audience sources praised as crisp and well‑balanced; a few early drum hiccups mentioned but no major issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall high energy with an East‑Coast vibe; strong crowd interaction especially during Candyman, and a solid, uninterrupted Terrapin Station.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as “strong” and hitting all the perfect moments after his recent ordeal.
band_member_comments.Drums: A few hiccups near the beginning, possibly odd drum stuff.
